evals.prompt: Show me the portal link for the EOV Test Block Model.
evals.expected_output: A portal URL is returned for the specified block model object.

evals.prompt: Generate viewer links without specifying any object IDs.
evals.expected_output: The request fails with a validation error indicating that at least one object ID must be provided.

evals.prompt: I want to see my variogram model in the Evo Viewer — can you give me a link?
evals.expected_output: The system explains that variograms are not supported in the Evo Viewer

evals.prompt: Show me my EOV Test Block Model and EOV Test Point Set together — I want to see them side by side.
evals.expected_output: The system generates an Evo Viewer link for the block model and the mixed point set.
